title: Psychopath (horror)
description: He is hunting on you now.
body:
Psycho - is my new horror project i made with my friend that adds not a paranormal creepy creature

but human filled with anger and will to kill.

At the start he will stalk you but as the days past he will get more agressive.

If you encounter psycho you have two options:
RUN

Obviously just run as fast as you can because of the PANIC you can't build or break blocks.

FIGHT

After all he is still a human so you can try and kill him. 

To make fight more exciting i added such cool mechanic as PARRY
If you use shield at the right time before attack psycho will get stunned for 3 seconds. 

Use that time right.

Cool features:

His damage scales on difficulty.

He got two different skins:

use command /skin_1 and /skin_2 to change them
You can disable red vingette 
/showvignnetefalse
Also there are a few commands to configure visuals

/enableblur /disableblur – Toggles damage-induced blur effect.

/enableheartbeat /disableheartbeat – Toggles the heartbeat effect.

/enablevignette /disablevignette – Toggles blood effects.

CREDITS FOR CHASE THEMES GOES FOR CRY OF FEAR

 

 

Have fun!
